purpose: Fallbacks that the context builder must not use because they caused old scene errors.

forbidden_fallbacks.rule: Do not insert Akira into scene_ids or loaded_characters just because the active list is empty.
forbidden_fallbacks.correct_behavior: Return builder diagnostic: active character selection failed.

forbidden_fallbacks.rule: Do not replace full character files with a short personality summary.
forbidden_fallbacks.correct_behavior: Load main, character, knowledge and memory for every selected character.

forbidden_fallbacks.rule: Do not use hidden past to drive dialogue, narration or reaction unless past_trigger_rules allow it.
forbidden_fallbacks.correct_behavior: Keep hidden fact out of context and add it to forbidden_context if needed.

forbidden_fallbacks.rule: Do not load all relationship pairs for a POV or all pairs connected to Akira.
Do not treat calendar/canon notes as something a character knows.
forbidden_fallbacks.correct_behavior: Convert only visible, sourced facts into knowledge_boundary.

forbidden_fallbacks.rule: Do not let NPCs know names, roles, relationships or hidden status without source in loaded knowledge/memory/scene.
forbidden_fallbacks.correct_behavior: Put missing source facts into unknown/must_not_assume.

forbidden_fallbacks.rule: Do not make a character physically arrive because they are important to plot.
forbidden_fallbacks.correct_behavior: Arrival requires calendar, location, message, order, patrol, prior motion, or direct scene trigger.

diagnostic_shape.reason: why old fallback would be unsafe
